rationale: Section 46.035 is purely procedural, incorporating §46.009 for payment mechanics. It contains no dollar thresholds or exemption formulas directly affected by raising the homestead exemption.
quote: Sec. 46.035. PAYMENT OF ASSISTANCE. Section 46.009 applies to the payment of assistance under this subchapter.
_note: No direct conflict; §46.035 governs payment procedure only, not funding amounts or tax rates.
